title: dryopteris rudis
intro: Dryopteris rudis, also known as Rough Buckler Fern, is a type of perennial fern native to Japan and parts of Asia, characterized by its distinctive leaf structure and growth habit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris rudis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
